status_detail: v5-card (plain text after [card]: within HTML comment delimiters) did NOT render the warning in chat UI. Same state as v4: user prompt bubble visible, but stuck at '理解问题' (thinking) indicator. card type alone does not trigger baidu's chat bubble rendering. This rules out hypothesis that card type is the simplest path — confirms we need the multi-chunk approach (baseData + generator) to establish the message anchor.

v4_to_v5_comparison.v4_status: parser accepted envelope (no status error), but no rendering
v4_to_v5_comparison.v5_card_status: parser accepted envelope (no status error), still no rendering
v4_to_v5_comparison.conclusion: card type is NOT the shortcut - baidu frontend needs the baseData+generator message flow to bind content to chat UI

network_evidence.thinking_indicator: stuck at '理解问题' (same as v4 and v3)

next_step_required: Switch to baidu_sse_v5_multi template (already prepared per request notes). This sends [baseData] chunk first with msgId+sessionId to establish the message anchor, THEN [generator] chunk with warning content, finally [generator] chunk with state=generate-complete+endTurn=true.

v5_multi_expected_structure.chunk_2_generator: <!--chat-sse-data-start[generator]:{"status":0,"data":{"message":{"content":{"text":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다."},"metaData":{"state":"generating-resp","seqId":2}}},"seq_id":2}chat-sse-data-end-->
v5_multi_expected_structure.chunk_3_complete: <!--chat-sse-data-start[generator]:{"status":0,"data":{"message":{"content":{"text":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다."},"metaData":{"state":"generate-complete","endTurn":true,"seqId":3}}},"seq_id":3}chat-sse-data-end-->

recommended_dev_actions: Switch to baidu_sse_v5_multi template (mentioned as standby in #512 request). Three chunks: baseData → generator → generator(complete).
Generate UUID for msgId per request (or use static 'apf_warning' + counter).
Ensure each chunk has its own SSE delimiter wrap and sent sequentially in the HTTP/1.1 response body.
seq_id at root level may be critical — per #509 destructuring pattern. Increment each chunk.
If v5_multi still fails, next diagnostic: inspect baidu's real #508 response bytes for 'What is 2+2?' query to see the EXACT msgId/sessionId flow.
notes_for_dev: v5-card ruled out. Time to test v5_multi. The baidu frontend apparently needs the full message lifecycle (init→content→complete) to render, not a single chunk. Your standby template v5_multi (603B) is the right approach per #509's decoded flow. Please deploy and I'll verify immediately.
retry_context: #511 v4 = parser OK, no render. #512 v5-card = still no render. Next: v5_multi.
automation_method: windows-mcp (App switch + Ctrl+T + Clipboard+Ctrl+V for URL + Type label for prompt + Enter submit + screenshot). Fast iteration mode.
